name: Suspicious Access to lsass Process From Unknown Call Trace
notes: This rule triggers when a suspicious access to lsass is initiated from an unknown call trace.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001829) ProcessAccess
when the event matches "Target Process Name" IMATCHES 'lsass\.exe' and "Granted Access" IMATCHES '(0x1010)|(0x1410)|(0x143A)|(0x1400)|(0x147a)|(0x143a)' AQL filter query
when the event matches "Call Trace" IMATCHES '.*\\Windows\\system32\\KERNELBASE\.dll\+\w+\|UNKNOWN.*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Access to lsass Process From Unknown Call Trace on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001829) ProcessAccess
AND when the event matches "Target Process Name" IMATCHES 'lsass\.exe' and "Granted Access" IMATCHES '(0x1010)|(0x1410)|(0x143A)|(0x1400)|(0x147a)|(0x143a)' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches "Call Trace" IMATCHES '.*\\Windows\\system32\\KERNELBASE\.dll\+\w+\|UNKNOWN.*' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Detected a Malicious Access to lsass Process from Unknown Call Trace
Event description: Detected a Malicious Access to lsass Process from Unknown Call Trace
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
